title: Herstel met Juvederm | Juvéderm® Netherlands
metaDescription: Ready for a refresh? Our skin’s natural elasticity decreases over time, and as it does, you may start to notice a few volume changes across your face. Whether you’re looking to achieve a more youthful appearance or simply enhance the things that make you, you, the JUVÉDERM® range of fillers can delicately plump your lips, add volume to your cheeks, contour your chin and jawline and smooth fine lines.
settle_strategy: networkidle + main.textLength stable 500ms x2; dismissed overlays
